policy: Every override is keyed by a selected source ID and exact SHA-256, or by a deterministic, exact family source-set hash. Historical source units are unresolved unless this file records source-specific evidence. Netlib hosting, government sponsorship, and institutional affiliation alone are insufficient; the elementary approvals cite express public-domain statements and a Version 4.1 subset-scope record.

sources.governing_notice: NIST and NTIS expressly identify SLATEC as public domain.
sources.redistribution_conditions: No licence-imposed condition is stated in the reviewed public-domain records; preserve factual source attribution.
